items.titolo: Major Cloudflare outage took down ChatGPT, X, and Spotify Tuesday - here's what happened
items.descrizione: A major outage rippled across the web, knocking many of the internet's biggest sites offline.

items.titolo: You should still learn to code, says top Google AI exec - here's why
items.descrizione: ZDNET sat down with Andrew Ng at AI Dev 25 in New York to talk about developer futures, responsible AI, and why AGI is overhyped.
